repo: nix-config worktree .worktrees/persist-claims-open-emit (branch demo/persist-claims-open-emit, throwaway); durable artifacts -> papers analysis/experiments/synthetic-fleet/

tasks.subject: Task 0: Synth host factory + identity axis
tasks.note: enable file is enable.nix NOT _enable.nix (import-tree excludes /_ paths); observe.classKey read surface = flake den-debug.classKey (flake-parts-level option, not under nixosConfiguration.config)
tasks.description: Parametric factory: class-spec list -> N synth host entities (axon-synth-NNN) with per-index identity axis; class key (sorted includes, channel, system); synthFleet.enable default OFF, committed _enable.nix=true on the throwaway branch. role realized AS an include.

acceptanceCriteria: enable default false; off-diff = only axon-01/02/03 (git stash _enable.nix)
N synth entities with distinct index-synthesized identity axis

tasks.subject: Task 1: Facter generator (shared/varied regimes)
tasks.description: Per-host facter facts in two regimes; ssh-ed25519 host key -> valid age recipient. gen-keys.sh emits committed synth-keys.json (recipients only). Pre-empt device_id x facter-disk coherence.

acceptanceCriteria: facts override avoids on-disk per-host file
shared regime byte-identical; varied distinct + valid age1... recipients

tasks.note: facter.report IS eval-forced (readFile via core.boot.network-initrd); facts overridden via builtins.toFile (no IFD); facterRegime fleet-level; device_id decoupled from facter disks; 128 committed key recipients

tasks.subject: Task 2: Synthetic secrets (agenix master + rekey generation)
tasks.description: Synthetic agenix master + per-host facter age recipient; rekey GENERATION step (00-rekey.sh) produces N secret store paths. NO aspect-disable fallback. If fallback to shared dummy secret, couples to 8b fidelity (caveat).

tasks.subject: Task 3a: Full-axon class assembly + topology skeleton (structure)
tasks.description: Realistic-axon default classes (base + superclass + server/agent-as-includes, >=2 channels); synth environment + cluster + bgp hub; heavyClosedAspects toggle (a sweep dim). Structure resolves at N=10 (full forcing is 3b).

acceptanceCriteria: default classes = realistic mix; server/agent = distinct class keys; >=2 channels
heavyClosedAspects toggle exists (sweep dim, not fixed default)

tasks.subject: Task 3b: Criterion 1a - config fixpoint forces without throwing at scale
tasks.description: 1a no-throw at N=10/50/100 via deepSeq(config.assertions + in-cone {systemd,networking,disko,age} - derivation leaves). The eval-feasibility/debug task (secrets, bgp-hub-at-100, k3s, mesh, device_id x facter). Coverage ceiling stated. heavy off then on.

acceptanceCriteria: 1a PASS N=10,50,100 (0 throws in the cone)
coverage ceiling printed (throw-free in forced cone, not whole-config)

tasks.subject: Task 4: Open-emit variants + collect modes + S1 trigger + cycle test (criterion 1b)
tasks.description: Four open-emit cones (light/heavy/host-varying/empty); central-O(N) vs per-host-O(N2) collect (per-host = acyclic fan-out only); global-flag trigger fixture (knob, default off); mutual-collect cycle = rejection test (timeout, not hang). 1b at N=100. PHASE-1 CHECKPOINT.

acceptanceCriteria: per-host O(N2) acyclic only; cycle fixture rejected within timeout
global-flag trigger trips resolve.nix:393-408 when on

tasks.subject: Task 5: Measurement driver core (eval-cache-off + stats + variance)
tasks.description: Shared eval wrapper: forces --option eval-cache false + cache-bust; NIX_SHOW_STATS capture; fn/copies deterministic load-bearing, cpuTime/maxRSS median/IQR over repetitions. Phase-1 scripts refactor onto this (DRY).

tasks.subject: Task 6: Differential per-edge / per-peer perf
tasks.description: Per-peer increment = stats(N+1)-stats(N) within a FIXED class; force-one vs force-none. Sweep N,K,cone,channel,role, and heavyClosedAspects on/off -> closed-aspect vs open-emit O(N2) as SEPARATE curves.

acceptanceCriteria: closed vs open O(N2) separate curves (heavy on - heavy off)

tasks.subject: Task 7: Multi-depth poison sentinels (force-counter)
tasks.description: value-poison + structure-poison overlays; per-edge force-set; reported quantity = value-forcing under throws-OBSERVED ceiling (structure separate; tryEval invisible to both, documented). Couples to Task 4 collect modes.

acceptanceCriteria: value vs structure poison distinguish value/structure forcing

tasks.subject: Task 8a: Class partition + exact/near-class share ratios
tasks.description: Partition by (sorted includes, channel, system); K, sizes, a singleton class. exact-bucket AND near-class ratios; near-class rule: same-(channel,system), base=maximal common include-set, includes superset base & |delta|<=threshold; never cross channel/system.

acceptanceCriteria: server and agent in different classes; singleton present
exact + near-class ratios with rule stated

tasks.subject: Task 8b: Two-regime facter differential (core/identity/facter split)
tasks.description: VALUE-level cross-host diff-of-diffs (NOT option-name diff): idPaths=shared-facter cross-host value-diff; idFacterPaths=varied-facter; facterPaths=idFacter-id; core=all-idFacter. Comparison surface = rendered-derivation drvPaths (NOT toJSON; hashString throws on functions). Reports both regimes; varied core < shared core (robust to joint paths; disko named).

acceptanceCriteria: value-level diff-of-diffs over rendered drvPaths (pair/class, union if >2)
non-empty facterPaths in varied, degenerate in shared
varied core < shared core strictly; joint-function (disko) caveat printed

tasks.subject: Task 9: Canonicalized-core parity oracle
tasks.description: Per class, comparison PAIR of same-class hosts; override EXACTLY the Task-0 identity-axis enumeration + facter to a sentinel; assert toplevel.drvPath equality of canonicalized configs (~2 forces/class). Teeth: planted out-of-axis env.etc leak -> diverge -> FAIL. Raw cross-host drvPath shown constant-unequal (motivation).

acceptanceCriteria: override key-set == Task-0 axis key-set (verbatim) asserted

tasks.subject: Task 10: gen-rebuild provenance projection
tasks.description: Project pipe wiring into a gen-rebuild graph: nodes=emits+collects, edges=collect-depends-on-emit. why/support/dependentsFrontier (blast-radius bounded at plane edges). Slip-hatch: documented deferral to 2.4 if heavy/ill-defined (NOT silent omission).

acceptanceCriteria: why/support/dependentsFrontier answer on the synth fleet

tasks.subject: Task 11: Baseline N=100 measurement + durable reports
tasks.description: Full sweep N{10,50,100}/K/cone/channel/role/heavyClosed; durable report to papers analysis/experiments/synthetic-fleet/ (scaling curves; closed vs open O(N2) separate; S2 cone-savings; both facter regimes + both exact/near ratios; parity-oracle per class; force-counts; provenance-or-slip). Content-shareability (8a/8b) and eval-perf (T6) SEPARATE sections. All caveats incl disko + secret-fallback. 2.0 COMPLETE.

acceptanceCriteria: report with all crumbs + separate content/perf sections
patch + raw stats committed; all caveats present
